External database

Browse external SQL Server tables and sync data from Excel (when enabled).

External database

Connectors are configured by admins in the Admin → DB Connectors panel. Select a connector to browse its data or run Excel sync, depending on your permissions.

You do not have access to Database Connectors. Ask an admin to enable the "Database Connectors" module for your user.

Browse connector table

Read-only, paginated view of the target table with search.
